---
name: test-coverage
description: Analyze tests, coverage, and quality gates for generated services.
---

# Test Coverage Skill

## Checklist
- Inspect failing tests and coverage reports before editing.
- Add focused tests for changed behavior and important edge cases.
- Keep quality gates intact; do not lower thresholds to pass CI.
- Validate with the narrowest relevant test command first, then broader checks.

## Output
Report failures, added or recommended tests, coverage gaps, and validation result.
